race.comment: ALLA RUSTICA (4) blew the start on debut in the spring and was give another break. Fitter for three jump-outs and jumps from a low draw. Has ability and expected to run well. ZERCARDY (8) raced on speed and finished third on debut at Ararat. Should come on following that hit-out and looks set to go close at home. FOXWEDGE ARROW (3) showed ability in first two starts then went for a break. Returns with the blinkers added fitter for a host of jump-outs. Can do better this time in. NORENSON (6) is a three start maiden who was back and wide throughout fresh. Fitter and expected to improve sharply. TRANSPORTER (7) was solid when midfield in a richer maiden on debut and will be much better for the experience.
